title: astragalus amoenus subsp. squalidus
intro: Astragalus amoenus subsp. squalidus, also known as the Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include immune system support, cardiovascular health, and protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Astragalus amoenus subsp. squalidus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and extracts to take advantage of its potential health benefits.
